game_info.title: Zenonia 4 Demake
game_info.concept:
ZENONIA® 4: Return of the Legend, Extreme Action RPG

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/zenonia-4/id476266112

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

ZENONIA® 4: Return of the Legend, Extreme Action RPG

The definitive action RPG has returned, now in glorious HD! 
When an ancient evil threatens to erupt onto the world, heroes of the ages must assemble once again to change the course of destiny.
Join Regret, Chael, Ecne, Lu and more to embark on the greatest ZENONIA adventure yet!

THE BEST-LOOKING ZENONIA® EVER
Explore the overworld in vivid HD, now with spectacular visuals and top-notch animations optimized for Retina displays.

DYNAMIC AND VISCERAL COMBAT 
Become a force to be reckoned with -- unleash powerful combo hits and devastating skills with explosive graphical and aural flair.

GEAR UP AND CUSTOMIZE FOR EPIC ADVENTURE
Choose the best strategy and equip your Slayer, Blader, Ranger or Druid class hero with countless armor options, weapons and items. 

DEFINITIVE ACTION RPG EXPERIENCE
Level up through Normal, Hard and Hell mode. Master the Fairy sync system and annihilate hundreds of normal and legendary monsters.

CHALLENGE THE WORLD IN EXPANDED PVP
Tackle asynchronous online PvP with the new 2-on-2 arena battles or compete in the Abyss zone for loot drops, and hire other player data as mercenaries. The Execution Room and classic 1-on-1 rumbles also return.

NEW TITLES, NEW REVELATIONS
Collect effect-boosting titles and over 40 Game Center achievements as you delve deeper into the secrets of ZENONIA®'s beloved characters.


NEWS & EVENTS 
Website http://www.gamevil.com 
Facebook http://facebook.com/gamevil 
Twitter http://twitter.com/gamevil 
YouTube http://youtube.com/gamevil

Terms of Service: http://terms.withhive.com/terms/policy/view/M61
Privacy Policy: http://terms.withhive.com/terms/policy/view/M61
game_info.description: Return to the legend in this demake of the classic Action RPG. You play as a legendary hero destined to save the world from ancient evil. Explore a dangerous overworld, battle slimes, dark knights, and confront the Abyss Lord. Level up, unlock powerful skills, and master the art of combat in this hack-and-slash adventure.
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Keys: Move character
- Space: Basic Attack (Combo system)
- Z: Use Active Skill (Spin Attack / Projectile)
- Shift: Dash / Dodge
- Enter: Start Game
- Esc: Pause Game
- R: Restart Game (from Game Over screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Verify player movement and basic collision with map boundaries.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The test controller will force the player to move in a square pattern (Right, Down, Left, Up) for 2 seconds each. This checks if position updates correctly and if the camera follows.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player coordinates change according to input. Player does not walk outside world bounds. Camera coordinates update to keep player centered.

TEST_1.expected: Player coordinates change according to input. Player does not walk outside world bounds. Camera coordinates update to keep player centered.

TEST_2.test_description: Test combat mechanics, damage dealing, and enemy aggro logic.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The controller locates the nearest enemy and moves directly towards it. Once within attack range (50px), it spams the Space key (Attack). It also uses the Z skill if available.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player swings sword. Enemy takes damage (health decreases). Floating damage numbers appear. Enemy dies and drops loot/XP.

TEST_3.test_description: Test leveling system and stat progression.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Simulate killing multiple enemies to gain XP. The test will verify if stats (Max HP, Attack) increase upon level up.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: XP bar fills up. Level increments from 1 to 2. Max HP and Attack values increase in the gameState player object.

TEST_3.expected: XP bar fills up. Level increments from 1 to 2. Max HP and Attack values increase in the gameState player object.
